mapper.select: SELECT crwc.id, crwc.record_id, crwc.config_level, crwc.parent_id, crwc.category_id, crwc.item_id, crwc.target_name, crwc.weight_config_id, cwc.config_name as weight_config_name, crwc.is_inherited, crwc.weight_enabled, crwc.weight_config_snapshot, crwc.created_at, crwc.updated_at FROM check_record_weight_configs crwc LEFT JOIN class_weight_configs cwc ON crwc.weight_config_id = cwc.id AND cwc.deleted = 0 WHERE crwc.deleted = 0 AND crwc.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY CASE crwc.config_level WHEN 'RECORD' THEN 1 WHEN 'CATEGORY' THEN 2 WHEN 'ITEM' THEN 3 END, crwc.category_id, crwc.item_id

SELECT crwc.id, crwc.record_id, crwc.config_level, crwc.weight_config_id, crwc.is_inherited, crwc.weight_enabled, crwc.weight_config_snapshot FROM check_record_weight_configs crwc WHERE crwc.deleted = 0 AND crwc.record_id = #{recordId} AND (
-- ITEM级别配置 (crwc.config_level = 'ITEM' AND crwc.item_id = #{itemId} AND crwc.is_inherited = 0) OR
-- CATEGORY级别配置 (crwc.config_level = 'CATEGORY' AND crwc.category_id = #{categoryId} AND crwc.is_inherited = 0) OR
-- RECORD级别配置（兜底） (crwc.config_level = 'RECORD') ) ORDER BY CASE crwc.config_level WHEN 'ITEM' THEN 1 WHEN 'CATEGORY' THEN 2 WHEN 'RECORD' THEN 3 END LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO check_record_weight_configs ( id, record_id, config_level, parent_id, category_id, item_id, target_name, weight_config_id, is_inherited, weight_enabled, weight_config_snapshot, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.recordId}, #{item.configLevel}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.targetName}, #{item.weightConfigId}, #{item.isInherited}, #{item.weightEnabled}, #{item.weightConfigSnapshot}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE check_record_weight_configs SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM check_record_weight_configs WHERE deleted = 0 AND record_id = #{recordId} AND config_level = 'RECORD' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM check_record_weight_configs WHERE deleted = 0 AND record_id = #{recordId} AND config_level = 'CATEGORY' ORDER BY category_id ASC
